visa_types.name: Official trip under 90 days
visa_types.documents_required:
Document Required Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5LyWIgybhTvxnVuZ7ezlgW/d2060093f62c40b05fd347d75926e0ea/swiss-schengen-visa-official-trip-under-ninty-days-doc-recent.pdf)
Application Form (English Deutsch) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3DsMIbfZfisg7SwJBVoHUK/5cd65d1e83be94767164d976c98208f2/visa-application-form.pdf)
Application Form (Arabic French) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/532WQiVLAZfwNy1DLlnw3t/15157a0a697c8c932cfcb06fc1f8bda9/visa-application-form-ar-fr.pdf)
Egyptian Medical Insurance Companies (https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/countries/countries-content/egypt/en/travel-insurance_EN.pdf)
Important Notice: Visa applications of persons with a valid residence permit in any other country than Egypt including UAE, will not be treated by Embassy of Switzerland in Egypt. They have to apply in their country of residence. This is valid for all kind of applications.
Important notice: According to the instructions of the Swiss Embassy, VFS only accepts ordinary passports, and the holders of diplomatic/service/special passport have to apply directly at the Embassy.
Based on the instructions of the Swiss Embassy in Cairo, it is not permitted to submit hotel or accommodation bookings issued by travel agencies or travel companies. The hotel or accommodation reservations must be made through international hotel booking websites.
visa_types.visa_fees:
There are no visa fees for official trips (participation to a meeting / session / workshop) if the invitation is sent from the United Nations Office or any other International Organizations in Genève or an Embassy / Mission in Genève / Bern
VFS Service fees is 1434 EGP (inclusive of VAT) can be paid in Cash or with Credit / Debit Card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Egyptian pounds is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee & service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
VISA Fee Exemption:
- Children below 6 years old
- Scientific researchers, as regulated in recommendation No. 2005/761/EG of the European Parliament
- Representatives of charitable organizations up to the age of 25 years, who travel to take part in meetings or conferences
- Family relatives of EU- /EFTA- and Swiss citizen
- Members of the Olympic committee
- Holders of a normal passport going officially to meetings or conferences organized by an agency according to the following list
 
https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/eda/de/documents/aussenpolitik/voelkerrecht/DV-liste-abkommen-org_DE_FR_EN.pdf (https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/eda/de/documents/aussenpolitik/voelkerrecht/DV-liste-abkommen-org_DE_FR_EN.pdf)
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.forms:
Schengen Visa Application Form English 
Schengen Visa Application Form French 
Document Required Checklist 
Declaration of consent (Applicants who do not sign this consent have to submit their application themselves)

For more information and to access the required documents and Applications forms please visit the following link: https://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/egypt/en/home/visa/entry-ch/up-90-days/documents-schengen.html (https://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/egypt/en/home/visa/entry-ch/up-90-days/documents-schengen.html)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Official trips (participation to a meeting / session / workshop) if the invitation is sent from the United Nations Office or any other International Organizations in Genève or an Embassy / Mission in Genève / Bern
Note:
All applicants have to ensure they select the correct travel category when booking. Choosing the wrong category will result in the inability to submit your documents.
Based on the instructions of the Swiss Embassy in Cairo, Somalian passports will not be accepted, even in cases of legal residence in Egypt.
Please note: It is required to book a tourist appointment for accompanying individuals, as it is not permitted to apply for a visa as an accompanying person under an official trip appointment.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Official trips (participation to a meeting / session / workshop) if the invitation is sent from the United Nations Office or any other International Organizations in Genève or an Embassy / Mission in Genève / Bern
Note:
All applicants have to ensure they select the correct travel category when booking. Choosing the wrong category will result in the inability to submit your documents.
Based on the instructions of the Swiss Embassy in Cairo, Somalian passports will not be accepted, even in cases of legal residence in Egypt.
Please note: It is required to book a tourist appointment for accompanying individuals, as it is not permitted to apply for a visa as an accompanying person under an official trip appointment.

## Visa Fees
There are no visa fees for official trips (participation to a meeting / session / workshop) if the invitation is sent from the United Nations Office or any other International Organizations in Genève or an Embassy / Mission in Genève / Bern
VFS Service fees is 1434 EGP (inclusive of VAT) can be paid in Cash or with Credit / Debit Card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Egyptian pounds is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee & service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
VISA Fee Exemption:
- Children below 6 years old
- Scientific researchers, as regulated in recommendation No. 2005/761/EG of the European Parliament
- Representatives of charitable organizations up to the age of 25 years, who travel to take part in meetings or conferences
- Family relatives of EU- /EFTA- and Swiss citizen
- Members of the Olympic committee
- Holders of a normal passport going officially to meetings or conferences organized by an agency according to the following list
 
https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/eda/de/documents/aussenpolitik/voelkerrecht/DV-liste-abkommen-org_DE_FR_EN.pdf (https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/eda/de/documents/aussenpolitik/voelkerrecht/DV-liste-abkommen-org_DE_FR_EN.pdf)

## Documents Required
Document Required Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5LyWIgybhTvxnVuZ7ezlgW/d2060093f62c40b05fd347d75926e0ea/swiss-schengen-visa-official-trip-under-ninty-days-doc-recent.pdf)
Application Form (English Deutsch) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3DsMIbfZfisg7SwJBVoHUK/5cd65d1e83be94767164d976c98208f2/visa-application-form.pdf)
Application Form (Arabic French) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/532WQiVLAZfwNy1DLlnw3t/15157a0a697c8c932cfcb06fc1f8bda9/visa-application-form-ar-fr.pdf)
Egyptian Medical Insurance Companies (https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/countries/countries-content/egypt/en/travel-insurance_EN.pdf)
Important Notice: Visa applications of persons with a valid residence permit in any other country than Egypt including UAE, will not be treated by Embassy of Switzerland in Egypt. They have to apply in their country of residence. This is valid for all kind of applications.
Important notice: According to the instructions of the Swiss Embassy, VFS only accepts ordinary passports, and the holders of diplomatic/service/special passport have to apply directly at the Embassy.
Based on the instructions of the Swiss Embassy in Cairo, it is not permitted to submit hotel or accommodation bookings issued by travel agencies or travel companies. The hotel or accommodation reservations must be made through international hotel booking websites.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself. The photographs should be in color and:
- Taken       against a light background (white or off-white) so that features are       distinguishable and contrast against the background
- Clear       share quality and with the face in focus.
- Printed       on normal photographic paper (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling (without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering)
- Please       stick the Photograph on the Visa Application Form.
Note: Please follow these  instructions carefully. If photographs presented do not meet these requirements  your application will be considered incomplete. Photo booth meeting these  requirements is available at the centre.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form English 
Schengen Visa Application Form French 
Document Required Checklist 
Declaration of consent (Applicants who do not sign this consent have to submit their application themselves)

For more information and to access the required documents and Applications forms please visit the following link: https://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/egypt/en/home/visa/entry-ch/up-90-days/documents-schengen.html (https://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/egypt/en/home/visa/entry-ch/up-90-days/documents-schengen.html)

- Please       stick the Photograph on the Visa Application Form.

Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

Egyptian Medical Insurance Companies (https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/countries/countries-content/egypt/en/travel-insurance_EN.pdf)
Important Notice: Visa applications of persons with a valid residence permit in any other country than Egypt including UAE, will not be treated by Embassy of Switzerland in Egypt. They have to apply in their country of residence. This is valid for all kind of applications.
Important notice: According to the instructions of the Swiss Embassy, VFS only accepts ordinary passports, and the holders of diplomatic/service/special passport have to apply directly at the Embassy.
Based on the instructions of the Swiss Embassy in Cairo, it is not permitted to submit hotel or accommodation bookings issued by travel agencies or travel companies. The hotel or accommodation reservations must be made through international hotel booking websites.
visa_types.visa_fees:

[che > egy > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Schengen visa for Gambians (6400 EGP)
The applicant who submit their applications at visa Application centre should pay the visa fee in Cash or with Credit/ debit card in Egyptian pounds.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Egyptian pounds is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee & service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

[che > egy > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 2]
VISA Fee Exemption:
- Children below 6 years old
- Scientific researchers, as regulated in  recommendation No. 2005/761/EG of the European Parliament
- Representatives of charitable organizations  up to the age of 25 years, who travel to take part in meetings or conferences
- Family relatives of EU- /EFTA- and Swiss  citizen
- Members of the Olympic committee
- Holders of a normal passport going officially  to meetings or conferences organized by an agency according to the following  list
https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/eda/de/documents/aussenpolitik/voelkerrecht/DV-liste-abkommen-org_DE_FR_EN.pdf (https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/eda/de/documents/aussenpolitik/voelkerrecht/DV-liste-abkommen-org_DE_FR_EN.pdf)
.
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is for applicants who intend to travel to Switzerland for holiday and recreation purposes.
Note:
All applicants have to ensure they select the correct travel category when booking. Choosing the wrong category will result in the inability to submit your documents.
Based on the instructions of the Swiss Embassy in Cairo, Somalian passports will not be accepted, even in cases of legal residence in Egypt.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is for applicants who intend to travel to Switzerland for holiday and recreation purposes.
Note:
All applicants have to ensure they select the correct travel category when booking. Choosing the wrong category will result in the inability to submit your documents.
Based on the instructions of the Swiss Embassy in Cairo, Somalian passports will not be accepted, even in cases of legal residence in Egypt.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees applicable for Tourist, Relatives/Friend, Business,  Conference, Sports and Cultural are: -

[che > egy > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Schengen visa for Gambians (6400 EGP)
The applicant who submit their applications at visa Application centre should pay the visa fee in Cash or with Credit/ debit card in Egyptian pounds.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Egyptian pounds is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee & service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

[che > egy > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 2]
VISA Fee Exemption:
- Children below 6 years old
- Scientific researchers, as regulated in  recommendation No. 2005/761/EG of the European Parliament
- Representatives of charitable organizations  up to the age of 25 years, who travel to take part in meetings or conferences
- Family relatives of EU- /EFTA- and Swiss  citizen
- Members of the Olympic committee
- Holders of a normal passport going officially  to meetings or conferences organized by an agency according to the following  list
https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/eda/de/documents/aussenpolitik/voelkerrecht/DV-liste-abkommen-org_DE_FR_EN.pdf (https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/eda/de/documents/aussenpolitik/voelkerrecht/DV-liste-abkommen-org_DE_FR_EN.pdf)
.

## Documents Requireds
Document Required Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/l3fUBMAyAtuDlKuO2cLkc/fe7ad50bc94ff77e3263c41d6e2d637b/Tourist-Visa-19.02.24.pdf)
Document Required Checklist for Students trip (Tourist Visa) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/14t7nyFdsFZUhOkSG33e11/b8677e0d5bf76ea69a5766a81bed25a6/students-trips-tourist-visa-2023.pdf)
Application Form (English Deutsch) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3DsMIbfZfisg7SwJBVoHUK/5cd65d1e83be94767164d976c98208f2/visa-application-form.pdf)
Application Form (Arabic French) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/532WQiVLAZfwNy1DLlnw3t/15157a0a697c8c932cfcb06fc1f8bda9/visa-application-form-ar-fr.pdf)
Egyptian Medical Insurance Companies (https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/countries/countries-content/egypt/en/travel-insurance_EN.pdf)
Important Notice: Visa applications of persons with a valid residence permit in any other country than Egypt including UAE, will not be treated by Embassy of Switzerland in Egypt. They have to apply in their country of residence. This is valid for all kind of applications.
Important notice: According to the instructions of the Swiss Embassy, VFS only accepts ordinary passports, and the holders of diplomatic/service/special passport have to apply directly at the Embassy.
Based on the instructions of the Swiss Embassy in Cairo, it is not permitted to submit hotel or accommodation bookings issued by travel agencies or travel companies. The hotel or accommodation reservations must be made through international hotel booking websites.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself. The photographs should be in color and:
- Taken       against a light background (white or off-white) so that features are       distinguishable and contrast against the background
- Clear       share quality and with the face in focus.
- Printed       on normal photographic paper (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling (without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering)
- Please       stick the Photograph on the Visa Application Form.
Note: Please follow these  instructions carefully. If photographs presented do not meet these requirements  your application will be considered incomplete. Photo booth meeting these  requirements is available at the centre.
- e applicant wears such items because       of their religious belief or ethnic background].

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form English 
Schengen Visa Application Form French 
Document Required Checklist
Document Required Checklist for Students trip (Tourist Visa)
Declaration of consent (Applicants who do not sign this consent have to submit their application themselves)

For more information and to access the required documents and Applications forms please visit the following link: https://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/egypt/en/home/visa/entry-ch/up-90-days/documents-schengen.html (https://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/egypt/en/home/visa/entry-ch/up-90-days/documents-schengen.html)

Note:
All applicants have to ensure they select the correct travel category when booking. Choosing the wrong category will result in the inability to submit your documents.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is for applicants who intend to travel to Switzerland for Medical Treatment purposes.
Note:
All applicants have to ensure they select the correct travel category when booking. Choosing the wrong category will result in the inability to submit your documents.
Based on the instructions of the Swiss Embassy in Cairo, Somalian passports will not be accepted, even in cases of legal residence in Egypt.
Please note: It is required to book a tourist appointment for accompanying individuals, as it is not permitted to apply for a visa as an accompanying person under a medical appointment.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees applicable for Tourist, Relatives/Friend, Business,  Conference, Sports and Cultural are: -

[che > egy > en > Table:Medical Treatment > Visa Fees 1]
Schengen visa for Gambians (6400 EGP)
The applicant who submit their applications at visa Application centre should pay the visa fee in Cash or with Credit/ debit card in Egyptian pounds.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Egyptian pounds is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
The Visa fee & service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused

[che > egy > en > Table:Medical Treatment > Visa Fees 2]

- Children below 6 years old
- Scientific researchers, as regulated in recommendation No. 2005/761/EG of the European Parliament

- Family relatives of EU- /EFTA- and Swiss citizen

Important Notice: Visa applications of persons with a valid residence permit in any other country than Egypt including UAE, will not be treated by Embassy of Switzerland in Egypt. They have to apply in their country of residence. This is valid for all kind of applications.
Important notice: According to the instructions of the Swiss Embassy, VFS only accepts ordinary passports, and the holders of diplomatic/service/special passport have to apply directly at the Embassy.
Based on the instructions of the Swiss Embassy in Cairo, it is not permitted to submit hotel or accommodation bookings issued by travel agencies or travel companies. The hotel or accommodation reservations must be made through international hotel booking websites.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself. The photographs should be in color and:
- Taken       against a light background (white or off-white) so that features are       distinguishable and contrast against the background
- Clear       share quality and with the face in focus.
- Printed       on normal photographic paper (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling (without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering)
- Please       stick the Photograph on the Visa Application Form.
Note: Please follow these  instructions carefully. If photographs presented do not meet these requirements  your application will be considered incomplete. Photo booth meeting these  requirements is available at the centre.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

Overview
SwissCham is non-governmental organization, if you’re traveling to Switzerland for Business purposes and you’re a member of this association please contact our call centre for further assistance to book your appointment.
visa_types.full_text:

## Visa Fees

Note: Please follow these  instructions carefully. If photographs presented do not meet these requirements  your application will be considered incomplete. Photo booth meeting these  requirements is available at the centre.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
